runTitle: Vercel Targeted Release Validation - v8.11.3 production drift

expertAssessments.rationale: Release automation now detects version drift, but the GitLab tag deploy failure still blocks production rollout.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Inspect GitLab failed job 13829853789 trace and fix the frontend deploy stage before retrying with v8.11.4.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed after release validation failure; effective 4.5991 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, no unexpected billed spike.

pendingImprovements.title: GitLab tag deploy failure root cause analysis for v8.11.3
pendingImprovements.note: Need failed job 13829853789 trace to confirm whether VERCEL_TOKEN/protected variable or vercel build step caused the deploy miss.

notes: Release commit/tag push succeeded but production alias still serves buildVersion 8.11.0.
Runner health remained normal during the failure window.
Two successful jobs around the same window indicate the self-hosted runner itself is not the blocker.
